common.loadFailed: Could not load data. Check your connection.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to your FitTrack Pro account
login.offline: No internet connection — please reconnect and try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.name: Name
register.signInFailed: Account created but sign-in failed. Please log in manually.

landing.tagline: The intelligent fitness tracker built for serious lifters. Log workouts, track progress, and get AI-ready insights.
landing.featureWorkoutsDesc: Log exercises, sets, reps, and weight with a clean, fast interface.
landing.featureProgressDesc: Charts, PRs, volume tracking, and consistency insights.
landing.featureAiDesc: Structured data designed for intelligent analysis and coaching.
landing.featureOfflineDesc: Train without internet. Everything syncs automatically when you're back online.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.name: Name
settings.preferencesDesc: Units, appearance, language, and training defaults
settings.languageDesc: Interface language (saved to your account and this browser)
settings.restTimerHint: Seconds between sets (used in active workouts)
settings.exportDesc: Download your training data for backup or analysis
settings.apiTokensDesc: Create a secret token so assistants can read your AI and export endpoints without your browser session.
settings.apiTokensClaudeHint: Put the token in Claude Desktop project instructions, an MCP server env var, or any script that calls your app with Authorization: Bearer …
settings.apiTokensNewOnce: Save this token now — it is only shown once.
settings.apiTokensEmpty: No tokens yet. Create one to connect Claude or automation.
settings.apiTokensErrSession: Session expired or not signed in. Refresh the page and log in again.
settings.apiTokensErrNoSecret: Server replied OK but sent no secret. Check the server logs.
settings.crossDeviceDesc: One account everywhere — your data lives on the server, not in a single browser.
settings.crossDeviceUrlLabel: Open this address on every device (bookmark or “Add to Home Screen”):
settings.crossDeviceHint: Sign in with the same email and password on each device. Do not use a computer-only URL such as localhost on your phone — use your real app link (for example your Vercel domain or home server).
settings.crossDeviceSyncNote: Workouts you log offline are stored on this device until you are online again; then they sync to your account and appear on your other devices. Install the app from the browser menu (“Add to Home Screen”) for a full-screen experience similar to an App Store app.
settings.calendarHint: Upcoming training days are added to a "FitTrack Pro" calendar, labeled with the next session from your plan.
settings.calendarWebHint: Days and time are saved to your account; calendar entries are created by the iOS app.
settings.cardioHint: Upcoming cardio days are added to a separate "FitTrack Pro Cardio" calendar.
settings.cardioWebHint: Cardio settings are saved to your account; calendar entries are created by the iOS app.

dashboard.volumeHint: Sum of weight × reps per period (working sets only)
dashboard.strengthTrendHint: Running best estimated 1RM per muscle group, by calendar week. Switch tabs to compare.
dashboard.strengthTrendEmpty: Log a few heavy sets — your best estimated 1RM will show here over time.
dashboard.bodyWeightSparklineHint: Log weight on the Body Weight page to see a sparkline here.
dashboard.noPrsYet: Complete a heavy set to log your first PR.
dashboard.noVolumeData: No volume data in the last 28 days.
dashboard.noWorkoutsYet: Finish a workout to see it listed here.
dashboard.gettingStartedIntro: Welcome to FitTrack Pro. Quick path to your first insights:
dashboard.gsStep1: Browse the Exercise Library and tap an exercise for history & charts
dashboard.gsStep2: and log working sets (warmups don't count toward volume here).
dashboard.gsStep3: Log body weight for the dashboard sparkline (Body Weight page).
dashboard.volumeEmpty: No volume in this range yet. Complete workouts with logged weight and reps.
dashboard.insightsSubtitle: Simple rules from your logs (not medical advice).
dashboard.insightDeloadFrequency: You logged {count} sessions in the last 21 days. If recovery, sleep, or joints are suffering, plan an easier week.
dashboard.insightDeloadStall: {count} sessions in the last 28 days with no new PR in three weeks. A lighter recovery week can help.
dashboard.insightPlateauExercise: {name}: estimated 1RM barely changed between the first and second half of the last ~8 weeks (peak ~{first} → ~{second}). Try varying reps, volume, or a short deload before pushing loads again.
dashboard.insightsAllGood: No overload or obvious plateau flags from these rules. Keep logging working sets.
dashboard.insightsKeepLogging: Complete a few more workouts — insights need a bit more history.
dashboard.nextWorkoutOfflineFallback: Can't start from a plan offline — start a workout manually instead.

workouts.title: Workouts
workouts.subtitle: History and in-progress sessions
workouts.noWorkoutsHint: Start a session to log exercises and sets.
workouts.newSubtitle: Optional name — you can change it during the session.
workouts.name: Name
workouts.dragToReorderAria: Drag to reorder exercise (or use Space to pick up, arrow keys to move)
workouts.emptyExercises: Add exercises to start logging sets.
workouts.removeExerciseConfirm: Remove this exercise from the workout?
workouts.finishConfirm: Finish this workout? You can still view it afterwards.
workouts.finishFailed: Could not finish the workout. Check your connection and try again.
workouts.generateWarmupsFailed: Could not build the warmup ramp. Please try again.
workouts.warmupTargetRequired: Enter the weight for your first working set first.
workouts.sessionSummaryNoPrevious: No previous completed workout to compare — keep going.
workouts.timerTrackingHint: Session timer runs from start until you finish — time is saved with the workout.
workouts.restTimerBackgroundHint: Rest timer stays visible while you navigate the app. With the screen on, it keeps counting in the background; when the screen is off or you leave the browser, iOS/Android may pause the page — allow notifications for an alert when rest ends. A countdown in the Dynamic Island / notch requires a native App Store app, not a website.
workouts.offlineModeBanner: Offline or pending sync: changes stay on this device and upload when you are back online.
workouts.offlineNoSnapshot: No saved copy of this workout on this device. Open it once while online, or start a new offline session.
workouts.startOfflineHint: Saves on this device first; syncs to your account when you reconnect.
workouts.deleteCompletedConfirm: Permanently delete this completed workout? Use this to remove test sessions so your stats stay accurate.
workouts.deleteCompletedOffline: You need an internet connection to delete.
workouts.cancelWorkoutConfirm: Cancel and discard this workout? All logged sets will be lost.

cardio.pickSubtitle: Starts on your Apple Watch — zone, time and calories show live on both devices.
cardio.watchUnreachable: Watch not reachable. Make sure the FitTrack app is open on your watch.
cardio.needsNativeApp: Cardio sessions need the FitTrack iPhone app with a paired Apple Watch.
cardio.waitingForData: Waiting for data from the watch…
cardio.noZoneHint: Heart rate too low for a training zone.
cardio.finishConfirm: Finish cardio session and save it to Health?
cardio.cancelConfirm: Cancel cardio session? It won't be saved.
cardio.activeSessionBannerAria: Switch to the active cardio session

plans.title: Plans
plans.subtitle: Reusable workout templates (e.g. push / pull). Start a day to log a timed session.
plans.emptyHint: Create a plan, add workout days (Push, Pull…), attach exercises, then start anytime — the session timer tracks your training time.
plans.deletePlanConfirm: Delete this plan and all its workout days? Past logged workouts are kept.
plans.noExercisesInDay: No exercises yet — add from your library.
plans.removeDayConfirm: Remove this workout day from the plan?

exercises.title: Exercises
exercises.noExercisesHint: Try adjusting your filters or create a custom exercise.
exercises.trendHint: Best estimated 1RM (Epley) in each completed workout.
exercises.historyHint: Non-warmup sets from workouts you finished (Finish workout). You do not need to tick every set.
exercises.noSetsYet: No sets found in completed workouts yet. Finish a workout that includes this exercise with reps logged.
exercises.pickerOpenDetail: Open exercise details in new tab
exercises.trendEmpty: Complete at least two workouts with this exercise to see estimated strength progress (Epley 1RM per session).
exercises.addExerciseDialogDesc: Search and select an exercise to add to your workout
exercises.offlinePickerNoCache: No exercise list stored yet. Open Exercises once while online to cache it for offline use.
exercises.volumeHint: Sum of weight × reps for each completed session.
exercises.volumeEmpty: Log at least two sessions with working sets to see volume per workout.
exercises.mostUsedSubtitle: Ranked by working sets in completed workouts. Pick one for estimated 1RM trend, volume, and set history.
exercises.mostUsedEmpty: No data yet. Finish workouts with logged working sets (non-warmup, weight × reps) to see your top exercises here.
exercises.formCreateDesc: Add a custom exercise to your library
exercises.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

bodyWeight.title: Body Weight
bodyWeight.subtitle: Log weight by day — same day updates the existing entry.
bodyWeight.trendHint: Add at least two entries on different days to see a trend line.

offline.banner: You are offline — changes are saved locally and sync when you reconnect.
offline.bodyWeightQueued: Saved offline — will sync when online.

coach.title: AI Coach
coach.subtitle: Powered by your training data
coach.intro: Hi! I'm your personal training coach. I have full access to your workout history, PRs, volume trends, and body weight. Ask me anything about your training.
coach.suggest3: What's my strongest exercise right now?
coach.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
coach.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Not medical advice.
coach.noApiKey: No Anthropic API key configured. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to your environment.

plateCalc.title: Plate Calculator
plateCalc.subtitle: Load your barbell in seconds
plateCalc.noPlatesNeeded: Bar weight only — no plates needed.
plateCalc.notAchievable: Not achievable with standard plates. Nearest: {nearest}
plateCalc.emptyHint: Enter a target weight to calculate plates.

share.shareText: Completed "{name}" — {sets} sets, {volume} total volume. Tracked with FitTrack Pro.
share.downloadHint: Screenshot to share on social media.

muscleMap.title: Muscle Map
muscleMap.subtitle: Last 7 days
muscleMap.noData: Complete a workout to see your muscle map.

records.title: Personal Records
records.subtitle: Your all-time bests
records.noRecords: No personal records yet. Complete a workout to get started!

health.title: Health
health.subtitle: Daily health metrics synced via iOS Shortcut
health.noDataHint: Set up the iOS Shortcut to sync Apple Health data automatically.
health.recoveryHigh: Great — you're ready to train hard
health.recoveryLow: Low — consider an easy session or rest

shortcutGuide.title: iOS Shortcut Setup
shortcutGuide.subtitle: Sync Apple Health automatically — pure Apple Shortcuts, no extra app
shortcutGuide.step1desc: Go to Settings → API Tokens and create a new token. Copy it.
shortcutGuide.step2desc: On your iPhone, open the Shortcuts app and create a new shortcut named "FitTrack Sync" with the actions listed below.
shortcutGuide.step3desc: In the final "Get Contents of URL" action, paste your API URL and add the header Authorization: Bearer <your token>.
shortcutGuide.step4desc: In the Shortcuts app: Automation → New → Time of Day → e.g. 9:00 AM → Run Shortcut → select "FitTrack Sync" → Run Immediately.
shortcutGuide.done: That's it — health data syncs every morning automatically, no third-party app required.
